lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in poor condition. There is significant damage to the exterior and the interior is heavily worn. It has major mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs to be roadworthy.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and multiple large dents. The interior shows heavy wear with several tears in the upholstery. The engine requires major mechanical work to be reliable.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition and has been meticulously cared for since day one. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep, mirror-like finish and absolutely no chips, scratches, or dents. Inside, the cabin looks and smells like new; the upholstery is pristine, and all electronic features and climate controls function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, with a smooth, powerful engine and a seamless transmission. It has been garage-kept, regularly detailed, and comes with a complete, up-to-date service record. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle that remains in showroom condition.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior is flawless, with original paint that retains its factory showroom luster, free from any scratches, dings, or rock chips. It has been strictly garage-kept and protected from all weather elements. Inside, the interior is virtually indistinguishable from new; the upholstery shows no signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and every electronic component functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in exceptional shape with a complete, documented service history and no history of accidents or repairs. A buyer can expect a collector-grade vehicle that drives exactly as it did the day it was manufactured. This is a rare opportunity to own a perfectly preserved example of this model.

This offering represents a premier opportunity for the professional seeking a sophisticated, high-performing vehicle at a competitive valuation.

It drives smoothly and has been well-loved, making it the perfect upgrade for someone who wants a solid ride without the brand-new price tag. You’re going to love how it feels on the road—come say hi and check it out for yourself!

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of luxury and performance, meticulously maintained to ensure a reliable and enjoyable driving experience. The exterior features a deep, lustrous finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only the minor road wear expected of a well-loved car. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a documented history of on-time oil changes and preventative maintenance. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This car has been garage-kept and smoke-free, offering a 'turn-key' opportunity for its next owner. It strikes the perfect chord for someone seeking a high-end feel and reliable performance without the showroom-floor price tag.

Available is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. This unit delivers linear power through its six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed manual transmission. Recent preventive maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity. The factory limited-slip differential provides excellent torque vectoring, while the suspension has been upgraded with Bilstein dampers and poly-bushings for sharpened turn-in response. Though the finish shows minor road patina, the drivetrain remains robust and the valvetrain is precisely shimmed. A driver-spec machine optimized for technical performance.
